Review this code for security issues: // gin.go (line 102)
// Engine trusts all proxies by default with `trustedProxies: []string{"0.0.0.0/0", "::/0"}`. This allo...
output:
File: gin.go (line 102)
Category: security
Severity: high
Description: Engine trusts all proxies by default with `trustedProxies: []string{"0.0.0.0/0", "::/0"}`. This allows any client to spoof their IP address when ForwardedByClientIP is enabled, leading to security vulnerabilities in production environments.
Suggested Fix: Change default to empty or minimal trusted CIDRs. Add clear warning in documentation and require explicit configuration for proxy trust.
Confidence: 95%
